# CWE-305 — Authentication Bypass by Primary Weakness (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-305-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Safe: administrative route always requires authenticated subject.
func AdminDashboard(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	sub := c.GetString("jwt_sub")
	if sub == "" {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "auth"})
		return
	}
	if c.GetString("role") != "admin" {
		c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "forbidden"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"panel": "admin"})
}
